Title: Catch Roll
description: Description (5pc) Maryland Blue Crab and pickled Daikon Radish (Takuan) are rolled inside Nori (seaweed wrap) and sushi rice then topped with sliced Scottish Salmon and finished with a Miso-Honey Sauce. Each piece is finished with a thinly sliced Serrano Pepper then garnished with Sesame Seeds. We will torch the roll table side to caramelize the Miso- Honey and toast the sesame seeds.
dropline: “Signature Catch Roll with Salmon, Maryland Blue Crab, Miso-Honey and Serrano Chile” **Runner will torch the roll at table** l will torch the roll table side to caramelize the Miso- Honey and toast the sesame seeds.
components: Maryland Blue Crab Mix : Kewpie Mayo, Chive, Crab and Tobiko. Miso-Honey : White Miso, Honey, Sake, Mustard, Pickled Ginger, Olive Oil and Garlic.
ingredients: Protein: Maryland Blue Crab, Scottish Salmon Preparation: Seared, Sushi roll (maki) Sauce: Miso Honey Sauce Side: Pickled Daikon Radish Garnish: Serrano Pepper, Sesame Seeds
allergies: Gluten / Soy / Sesame Seeds / Egg / Fin Fish / Shellfish / Alcohol / Allium (Garlic, Onion) / Citrus / Honey / Nightshade (Chili Peppers)

ingredients: Protein: Cauliflower Florets Preparation: Tempura Sauce: Vegan Spicy Aioli Side: Garnish: Chives

Title: Crispy Shrimp
description: Description Tiger Shrimp are Tempura Battered then fried until golden brown. The shrimp are tossed in a spicy aioli and garnished with Red Tobiko (contains soy & gluten) and Chives.

Title: Crunchy Rice Cakes
description: Description Tuna is finely chopped and mixed with spicy mayo, then piped over crispy pressed Sushi Rice. The dish is finished with Kabayaki, Spicy Mayo and Wasabi Tobiko. 2 pieces minimum

Title: Edamame
description: Description Soybeans simmered in salted water then finished with Maldon Sea Salt.

Title: Wagyu Fried Rice
description: Description 2 oz Australian Wagyu served in a volcanic stone bowl over crispy Sushi (Koshihikari) Rice mixed with Chinese Sausage, Shiitake Mushrooms, Carrots, Sugar Snap Peas and topped with a Fried Egg. The rice is seasoned with Ginger, Garlic, Fruikake, and finished with sliced Scallions. The dish is accompanied with a side of Shichimi Togarashi and Chili Garlic Crunch. (Addition of Lobster Optional)
dropline: “Wagyu Fried Rice, with Fried Egg on top. Please be careful as the volcanic stone bowl is very hot. Allow me to mix in the egg, Pork Sausage, crunchy garlic and Japanese Chili.”
components: Shichimi Togarashi : Japanese seven spice blend of Red Chili Pepper, Sansho Pepper, Orange Peels, Black Sesame Seeds, White Sesame Seeds, Nori and Ginger. Chili Garlic Crisps : Red Chilis, Garlic, MSG, Soy Sauce

Title: Wagyu Hot Rock
description: 2 Oz minimum per order (in ½ oz pieces) of: Japanese Wagyu Beef varietals. Including the Olive Beef from the Kagawa prefecture, Snow Beef from the Hokkaido prefecture, and Kobe Beef from the Hyogo prefecture. A Flight of all three wagyu varietals (½ oz each) may also be ordered. The Wagyu is thinly sliced then seasoned with Maldon Sea Salt and Black Pepper. The Wagyu is seared tableside on a Hot Rock, served with Citrus Teriyaki Sauce and pickled vegetables garnished with grilled battoned scallion
dropline: “Japanese A5 Wagyu served with Pickled Vegetables and Citrus Teriyaki”
components: Pickled Vegetables : Julienne Carrots, Julienne Daikon Wagyu Teriyaki : Soy, Sugar, Mirin, Garlic, Sake, Yuzu Kosho, Wasabi paste, Shiro Dashi, Sushi Vinegar, Lemon Juice
allergies: Gluten / Soy / Alcohol / Garlic / Onion / Citrus / Sesame

Title: Whole Branzino
description: Description Marinated Chimichurri Crusted - Oven Roasted Whole Branzino served with seasonal vegetables topped with a Market Salad. Garnished with Garlic Chips and Charred Lemon.
dropline: “Roasted Whole Branzino, Roasted Vegetables and Market Salad”
components: Chimichurri Marinade: Herb Oil, Cilantro, Parsley, Chives, Salt, Red Chili Flakes, Garlic, Thyme, Shallots, Lemon zest, Lemon Juice, Sauteed Vegetables : Baby Artichokes, Patty Pan Squash, Baby Zucchini, Baby Heirloom Cherry Tomatoes. Lemon Vinaigrette : Lemon Juice, Olive Oil, Mustard, Salt. Market Salad: Arugula, Crispy Quinoa, Watermelon Radish, Shaved Asparagus, Cherry Tomato, Shallot Vinaigrette
ingredients: Protein: Whole Branzino Preparation: Roasted Sauce: Chimichurri Marinade Side: Sauteed Vegetables, Market Salad Garnish: Garlic Chips. Charred half lemon
